message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFF5EE
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam actorStyle awesome
skinparam actorBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam actorBorderColor #000000
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFE0
skinparam noteBorderColor #000000
skinparam noteFontColor #000000
skinparam noteFontSize 12
skinparam noteFontStyle plain
skinparam noteFontName Arial
skinparam noteTextAlignment center
skinparam notePadding 10
skinparam noteMargin 5
skinparam noteBorderThickness 1
skinparam noteShadowing false
skinparam noteCornerRadius 5
skinparam noteArrowSize 10
skinparam noteArrowColor #000000
skinparam noteArrowStyle solid
skinparam noteArrowDirection right
skinparam noteArrowPosition end
skinparam noteArrowOffset 0
skinparam noteArrowLength 10
skinparam noteArrowWidth 5
skinparam noteArrowHeadSize 5
skinparam noteArrowHeadWidth 3
skinparam noteArrowHeadLength 5
skinparam noteArrowHeadColor #000000
skinparam noteArrowHeadStyle solid
skinparam noteArrowHeadDirection right
skinparam noteArrowHeadPosition end
skinparam noteArrowHeadOffset 0
skinparam noteArrowHeadLength 5
skinparam noteArrowHeadWidth 3
skinparam noteArrowHeadColor #000000
skinparam noteArrowHeadStyle solid
skinparam noteArrowHeadDirection right
skinparam noteArrowHeadPosition end
skinparam noteArrowHeadOffset 0

actor "personalAccount" as personalAccount
participant "browser" as browser
participant "Argos Notary" as argosNotary

personalAccount -> browser: navigate to supplychain
browser --> personalAccount: show supplychain
personalAccount -> browser: manage layout
browser -> argosNotary: get layout for supplychain
argosNotary --> browser: layout
browser --> personalAccount: show layout
personalAccount -> browser: change layout
browser --> personalAccount: show changed layout
personalAccount -> browser: sign and submit
browser -> personalAccount: ask passphrase
personalAccount --> browser: passphrase
browser -> argosNotary: get private key
argosNotary --> browser: private key
browser -> browser: decrypt private key
browser -> browser: sign layout
browser -> argosNotary: add layout with metadata
argosNotary -> argosNotary: replace layout on supplychain
argosNotary --> browser: 
browser --> personalAccount: 

title Manage a Layout on a Supply Chain
@enduml
